title: Metformin efficacy in type 2 diabetes glycemic control
research_question: Does metformin reduce HbA1c levels compared to placebo in adults with type 2 diabetes?

inclusion_criteria.text: Study population is adults diagnosed with type 2 diabetes mellitus
Intervention includes metformin as monotherapy or first-line treatment
Study reports HbA1c or fasting blood glucose as a primary outcome
Randomized controlled trial or prospective cohort study design

exclusion_criteria.text: Studies exclusively on type 1 diabetes or gestational diabetes
